blocking_defects.description: At least one Boston Old Colony precondition unmet (insured-notified / excess-warning / investigation / fair-consideration / reasonable-prudent-person).
blocking_defects.statute_or_case_cite: Boston Old Colony Ins. Co. v. Gutierrez, 386 So.2d 783, 785 (Fla. 1980)
blocking_defects.remediation_action: Document all five Boston Old Colony preconditions before close: insured notice + excess warning + investigation + fair consideration + prudent-person decision rationale.

blocking_defects.description: Claimant communication received pre-close not answered AND/OR not relayed to insured.
blocking_defects.statute_or_case_cite: Harvey v. GEICO Gen. Ins. Co., 259 So.3d 1, 7 (Fla. 2018)
blocking_defects.remediation_action: Answer every claimant communication pre-close; relay every settlement-relevant communication to the insured.

blocking_defects.description: Closure not classified into closed_with_payment / closed_without_payment / reopened.
blocking_defects.statute_or_case_cite: FL OIR market-conduct examination frame; NAIC Model Reg. 902 §5
blocking_defects.remediation_action: Adjuster must declare closure intent (with_payment or without_payment).

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Berges v. Infinity Ins. Co., 896 So.2d 665 (Fla. 2004)
doctrinal_gates.remediation_action: Adjuster must pick fault percentages from Liability distribution.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Fla. Stat. §624.155(3); Allstate Indemnity Co. v. Ruiz, 899 So.2d 1121
doctrinal_gates.evidence_ref: open_crns=0, none within active cure window

diligence_ledger.decision_rationale:
[Closure diligence — constants v1.2026-06-02]
Recommendation: blocked_by_defects.
Gates evaluated: 30.
  pass=7, fail=3, n_a=20.
Preservation until 2029-06-07. Components: sol_post_hb837=2028-04-12, fl_admin_code_regulatory_floor=2029-06-07

rationale_text:
[constants v1.2026-06-02] Cannot close — blocking defects must be cured.
Ready-to-close probability: 0.05.
OIR classification: not_yet_classifiable. Indemnity status: open. Defense status: n_a.
Blocking defects (3, ranked A→F):
  • [A] boston_old_colony_diligence_incomplete — Boston Old Colony Ins. Co. v. Gutierrez, 386 So.2d 783, 785 (Fla. 1980). Remediation: Document all five Boston Old Colony preconditions before close: insured notice + excess warning + investigation + fair consideration + prudent-person decision rationale.
  • [A] harvey_communication_delay — Harvey v. GEICO Gen. Ins. Co., 259 So.3d 1, 7 (Fla. 2018). Remediation: Answer every claimant communication pre-close; relay every settlement-relevant communication to the insured.
  • [D] record_classification_missing — FL OIR market-conduct examination frame; NAIC Model Reg. 902 §5. Remediation: Adjuster must declare closure intent (with_payment or without_payment).
Preservation hold through 2029-06-07.
Authority required: examiner (settlement=$0).

authority_tier_required.basis_for_tier: settlement_amount=$0 routed against examiner=$25000, senior=$75000, supervisor=$250000, manager=$1000000
